utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel and costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (with complete cost breakdown). Checking the final package: destination is provided (Lisbon, Portugal); travel_dates are provided (2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24); transportation includes flight details with costs (airline, class, dates, total_cost, currency) — fully specified; accommodation includes hotel name, type, location, cost, currency — fully specified; activities includes a list with names, durations, costs, total cost, and currency — fully specified; additional_services is listed as 'None required'—there is a value but no costs because none were required, which is acceptable since it explicitly says none; total_budget is given with a complete cost breakdown (flights, accommodation, activities, dining, total, budget limit, remaining, currency). All 7 items are covered and fully specified according to the format.
